'''Oor VII''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]]<ref name="TCSWE">{{CSWECite|II|415|Oor VII}}</ref> located within the [[Cronese Mandate/Legends|Cronese Mandate]], on the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]. In ancient times, Oor VII was a humming factory world, but millennia of environmental degradation had left it parched and thinly populated.<ref name="Xim Week" /> The planet was also known for its annual spelling bees.<ref name="HSatLL">''[[Han Solo and the Lost Legacy]]''</ref>

==Appearances==
*''[[Han Solo and the Lost Legacy]]'' {{1stm}}
